events.description: User dwells on the instruction screen: 'Please click the screen sharing button that appears, and choose the option to share this window.'
events.frame_description: A dark screen with white text providing instructions for screen sharing.

events.description: User pauses with the cursor visible in the bottom right area, likely waiting for a browser screen-sharing prompt to appear or reading the instructions.
User reads the task instructions presented on the screen regarding booking a return domestic flight on the Flight Centre website.
events.frame_description: The screen displays a series of text-based instructions for a usability testing task.

events.description: The instruction text on the screen updates dynamically, progressively revealing the details of the user's task.
events.frame_description: Text on the dark background changes as the automated session guide presents the scenario.

events.description: A 'Pop-up blocked' notification appears in the browser's address bar as the system attempts to open the target website.
events.frame_description: A small icon indicating a blocked pop-up is visible at the right end of the URL input field.

events.description: The browser navigates from the Askable session instructions to the Flight Centre homepage.
events.frame_description: The screen transitions from the dark instruction page to the Flight Centre website.

events.description: The Flight Centre website begins to load, displaying skeleton UI elements and promotional banners.
events.frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is visible with some content still in a loading state.

events.description: User examines the Flight Centre homepage as banners rotate from 'UK & Europe Sale' to 'Qantas Flights Sale'.
The 'Travel dates' calendar modal opens, displaying February and March 2026.
A promotional pop-up for 'World360' rewards appears, obstructing the calendar view.
User hovers over and clicks the 'X' button to dismiss the promotional pop-up.
events.frame_description: The cursor moves to the top right of the red ad and the ad disappears in the next frame.

events.description: User selects February 18th as the departure date in the travel dates calendar modal
events.page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Cruises

events.description: User selects February 21st as the return date in the travel dates calendar modal
events.page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Cruises

events.description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm the selected travel dates
events.page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Cruises

events.description: User clicks the 'Where to?' destination input field to open the search dropdown
events.page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Cruises

events.description: User selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the destination suggestions dropdown
events.page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Cruises

events.description: User pauses on the search form, likely reviewing the selected flight details before proceeding
events.page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Cruises

events.description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button
events.page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Cruises

events.description: Page navigates to the flight search results page
events.frame_description: The screen goes white as the new page begins to load

events.description: The flight search results page loads, transitioning from a blank screen to displaying search criteria (SYD to MEL) and a loading modal with a spinner and airline logos.
events.frame_description: The UI populates with flight search details and a 'stuffed with deals' loading message while the user waits.

events.description: User waits for the flight search results to load, keeping the cursor relatively still on the right side of the screen.
The flight search results page is in a loading state, displaying a progress spinner and rotating airline logos including Air Canada, Air New Zealand, ANA, and Etihad Airways.
events.frame_description: A red and white loading screen with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and a blue circular progress indicator.

events.description: The loading screen clears and the 'Select Departing Flight' results page becomes visible, showing flight options from Sydney to Melbourne.
events.frame_description: The flight search results interface with filters on the left and flight listings for Qantas and Virgin Australia.

events.description: User spends time reviewing the available flight options from Sydney to Melbourne.
events.frame_description: Flight search results page showing multiple flight options with prices.

events.description: User clicks on the flight price button for the 6:00am Qantas flight to view different fare types.
The 'Select Departing Fare Type' section expands, showing Red Edeal and Economy Flex options for the selected flight.
User examines the departing fare types (Red Edeal vs Economy Flex) in the selection modal.
User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Red Edeal' fare.
A loading overlay appears with the message 'Good choice! It's time to choose your flight for your return journey...'.
events.frame_description: Loading overlay visible over the search results.

events.description: The page transitions to the return flight selection screen.
User scrolls down the page to view more return flight options.
User examines the flight search results for Melbourne to Sydney.
events.frame_description: The user is viewing a list of flight results with various airlines and prices.

events.description: User clicks on the price button for the first flight result to view fare options.
The 'Select Returning Fare Type' modal opens, showing Lite, Choice, and Flex fare options.
events.frame_description: A modal overlay appears over the flight results.

events.description: User examines the returning flight fare options (Lite, Choice, Flex) for the Melbourne to Sydney flight.
events.frame_description: The 'Select Returning Fare Type' section is visible with Lite, Choice, and Flex options for a Virgin Australia flight.

events.description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare option.
events.frame_description: The cursor is over the Lite fare SELECT button, which is highlighted in a darker blue indicating a click.

events.description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Choice' fare option.
events.frame_description: The cursor is over the Choice fare SELECT button, which is highlighted in a darker blue indicating a click.

events.description: A loading screen with the message 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' appears.
events.frame_description: A loading overlay with a spinner is displayed over the fare selection screen.

events.description: The page content updates to the 'Review trip' screen.
events.frame_description: The 'Review trip' page is now visible, showing the selected flight details and a price summary.

events.description: User reviews the trip details and price summary on the 'Review trip' page.
events.frame_description: The user is looking at the flight details and the total price summary on the right side of the screen.

events.description: User scrolls down the page to view the 'Add-ons' and 'Seats' sections.
User moves the cursor over the 'SELECT SEATS' button.
User clicks the 'SELECT SEATS' button to open the seat selection interface.
The 'Select Seats' modal overlay appears with a 'Loading seat selector' message and spinner.
The 'Select Seats' modal is open and shows a loading spinner for the seat selector.
events.frame_description: Loading spinner visible in the seat selection modal.

events.description: The seat map for Flight 1 (SYD to MEL) finishes loading.
events.frame_description: Seat map for the first flight leg is now visible.

events.description: User examines the seat map for the first flight leg without making a selection.
events.frame_description: User moves cursor over the seat map while reviewing options.

events.description: User clicks the 'NEXT FLIGHT' button to move to the seat selection for the return leg.
events.frame_description: Cursor clicks the blue 'NEXT FLIGHT' button at the bottom right of the modal.

events.description: Loading spinner appears while the seat map for the second flight leg loads.
events.frame_description: Loading seat selector message and spinner for Flight 2.

events.description: The seat map for Flight 2 (MEL to SYD) finishes loading.
events.frame_description: Seat map for the second flight leg is now visible.

events.description: User clicks on seat '5E' in the seat map.
events.frame_description: User selects a specific seat, triggering a confirmation popover.

events.description: User clicks the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the selection popover.
events.frame_description: Cursor clicks the blue 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.

events.description: User clicks the 'DONE' button to finalize seat selection and close the modal.
events.frame_description: Cursor clicks the 'DONE' button at the bottom right.

events.description: The seat selection modal closes and the main page updates to show the selected seat 'Preferred 5E' and a total of $28.00.
events.frame_description: The main baggage page now displays the confirmed seat selection details.

events.description: User dwells on the page, likely reviewing the selected seats and baggage options.
events.frame_description: The screen shows flight details, baggage guarantee options, and seat selection summary.

events.description: User scrolls down the page to reveal the 'Online Captain's Pack' section and the 'CONTINUE' button.
events.frame_description: The view shifts from the seat selection area down to the Online Captain's Pack and the green Continue button.

events.description: User is reviewing the flight assistance and protection options on the baggage page.
events.frame_description: The screen shows various add-on options like priority assistance and price drop protection.

events.description: User hovers the cursor over the 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page.
User clicks the 'CONTINUE' button on the baggage selection page to proceed to traveller details.
events.frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page.

events.description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights' and 'Next up, your traveller details...'.
events.frame_description: A semi-transparent overlay with a loading spinner and confirmation text is visible over the previous page content.

events.description: The browser navigates from the results page to the passenger details page.
events.frame_description: The URL changes in the address bar, and the page content transitions from the loading state to the 'Travellers' page layout.

events.description: User waits for the 'Travellers' page to fully load and begins to examine the flight summary and sign-in options.
events.frame_description: The 'Travellers' page is visible, showing a flight summary on the right and a sign-in prompt. The main form content is still rendering.

events.description: The UI transitions from a summary view to the passenger details input form.
events.frame_description: The screen updates to show form fields for passenger name and date of birth.

events.description: User pauses to read the 'Heads up!' warning and examine the passenger details form fields.
events.frame_description: The passenger details form is visible with a warning message at the top.

events.description: User scrolls down the page to reveal additional form sections for rewards and contact information.
events.frame_description: The view shifts downward, bringing the phone number and email fields into view.

events.description: User is examining the passenger details form and the price summary on the right sidebar.
events.frame_description: The passenger details form is visible, including fields for name, date of birth, and contact information, alongside a price summary.

events.description: User scrolls down the page to view the bottom of the form and the 'CONTINUE' button.
events.frame_description: The view shifts downwards, revealing the 'CONTINUE' button and the email subscription checkbox at the bottom of the form.

events.description: User pauses on the passenger details page, possibly reviewing the summary or the 'Why book online with us?' section.
events.frame_description: The passenger details form is visible with a 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom.

events.description: User moves the cursor to the browser tab bar, hovering over the close button for the 'Flight Centre Australia' tab.
events.frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'x' on the active browser tab.
